data_description.device_id: Device ID of the gate, can be found in the Palgate app
data_description.phone_number: Phone number of Palgate Linked Device authorized for gate

advanced_options.name: Advanced Options
advanced_options.description: If you are unsure, leave at default values

data.allow_invert_as_stop: Allow triggering gate while opening, to invert direction

data_description.allow_invert_as_stop: If selected, STOP will trigger the gate again during open

select_device.title: Select gate
select_device.description: Select gate to configure (linked to phone {phone})

data_description.device_id: Device ID of the gate, can be found in the Palgate app

advanced_options.name: Advanced Options
advanced_options.description: If you are unsure, leave at default values

data.allow_invert_as_stop: Allow triggering gate while opening, to invert direction

data_description.allow_invert_as_stop: If selected, STOP will trigger the gate again during open

error.cant_reconfigure_device_id: Device ID cannot be reconfigured. Update rejected

abort.cannot_fetch_devices: Could not retrieve gate list from server. Please try again.
abort.no_devices_found: No more configurable gates for phone {phone}.

get_device_users.name: Get gate users
get_device_users.description: Retrieve the full list of users authorized for a gate, including count and raw user records.

entity_id.name: Gate entity
entity_id.description: The cover entity of the gate to query.

get_user_settings.name: Get user settings
get_user_settings.description: Retrieve the full user record for a single authorized user, identified by phone number.

entity_id.name: Gate entity
entity_id.description: The cover entity of the gate to query.

phone.name: Phone number
phone.description: Full intl. phone number of the user (e.g. 972501234567).

add_user.name: Add gate user
add_user.description: Add a new authorized user to a gate. Pass additional user record fields via 'settings' as a dict — see Palgate API docs for available fields.

entity_id.name: Gate entity
entity_id.description: The cover entity of the gate to add the user to.

phone.name: Phone number
phone.description: Full intl. phone number of the user to add (e.g. 972501234567).

settings.name: Settings
settings.description: Optional dict of user record fields to set (e.g. firstname, output1, dialToOpen). Passed directly to the Palgate API.

remove_user.name: Remove gate user
remove_user.description: Remove an authorized user from a gate.

entity_id.name: Gate entity
entity_id.description: The cover entity of the gate to remove the user from.

phone.name: Phone number
phone.description: Full intl. phone number of the user to remove (e.g. 972501234567).

set_user_settings.name: Set user settings
set_user_settings.description: Update an existing authorized user's settings. Pass only the fields to change via 'settings' — see Palgate API docs for available fields.

entity_id.name: Gate entity
entity_id.description: The cover entity of the gate.

phone.name: Phone number
phone.description: Full intl. phone number of the user to update (e.g. 972501234567).

settings.name: Settings
settings.description: Dict of user record fields to update (e.g. output1, dialToOpen, hidden). Passed directly to the Palgate API.

get_device_log.name: Get device log
get_device_log.description: Retrieve the access history log for a gate. Returns a list of access events including who opened the gate, when, and how.

entity_id.name: Gate entity
entity_id.description: The cover entity of the gate to query.
